young-kim.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Strong GOP archetype across Pillar A (life/marriage/family/liberty) + election integrity + border + 2A — but with FOUR HARD cross-aisle deviations that fine-tune the score. CONFIRMED TRUE: SOL Q0+Q1 (Born-Alive H.R.26 YES roll 29 + mother-of-four pro-life public ID), Q2 (signed 199-member Hyde letter), Q3 (SBA Pro-Life endorsement CA-39+CA-40); BM Q0+Q1+Q2 (NO on RFMA H.R.8404 both passages roll 373 + roll 513 + NO on Equality Act 2021 citing religious liberty); CL Q0 (Equality Act NO with explicit religious-liberty rationale); ES Q0 (Fiscal Responsibility Act YES roll 243); EI Q1 (SAVE Act YES per campaign issues page) + Q2 (voter ID explicit support) + Q4 (NO on 2nd Trump impeachment); BI Q0 (HR2 Secure the Border YES) + Q1 (Laken Riley YES roll 6) + Q2 (sanctuary opposition soft cite — HR2 sanctuary-defund inclusion confirms). CROSS-AISLE CATCHES — narrow but HARD: (1) EI Q0 TRUE — Jan 6 2021 voted to CERTIFY PA electors + pre-Jan-6 public statement opposing GOP challenge (process-conservative refusal to overturn); (2) BI Q3 FALSE — cosponsor 2026 DIGNIDAD Act offering legal status for up to 12M paired with enforcement (breaks from strict-enforcement axis); (3) ES Q4 mixed — CHIPS & Science Act YES (one of 24 GOP defectors) is corporate-subsidy / industrial-policy capture, cuts against fiscal restraint; (4) FP entire axis FALSE — interventionist hawk on Ukraine + Israel + Taiwan (April 2024 $95B supplemental YES) — RESOLUTE rewards RESTRAINT. HIGH-BAR NULL where evidence thin: entire 2A category (federal NRA-PVF grade not surfaced — only 2016 state AD-65 letter), industry_capture except CHIPS noted in stewardship, family_child_sovereignty beyond HR5 YES (no school-choice / parental-notification cite isolated to her). FRC/AFA scorecard numerics did not surface. Advanced June-2-2026 primary; CA-40 results being canvassed; Calvert projected advancing.

ken-calvert.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. HEADLINE CROSS-AISLE CATCH — biblical_marriage Q1+Q0 FALSE: Calvert was among the 47 House Republicans who voted YES on H.R.8404 Respect for Marriage Act (roll 373 7/19/22 + roll 513 12/8/22) — codifying same-sex marriage federally. Palm Springs redistricting reportedly the political driver. He had voted FOR DOMA in 1996. This is a substantive deviation from the conservative biblical-marriage axis on a top-tier marquee vote and the highest-value finding of this batch. CONFIRMED TRUE on rest of Pillar A + election integrity + border: SOL pattern (Vote Smart pro-life key-votes; SBA scorecard page exists but numeric blank — null Q3 endorsement), BM Q2 (Equality Act NO 2021), FCS Q0+Q1 (H.R.5 Parents Bill of Rights COSPONSOR + YES roll 161 3/24/23), CL Q1 (Equality Act NO doubles as religious-liberty), ES Q0 (Limit Save Grow Act YES + Heritage 74%/61%/87%), EI Q1 (SAVE Act YES roll 345 9/11/24) + Q0 OBJECTED to AZ/PA electors Jan 6 2021 (opposite directional vote from Kim — Calvert objected to certification, statement defending objection citing 'forensic investigation'), BI Q0 (HR2 YES — his Legal Workforce Act / E-Verify language rolled into HR2) + Q1 (Laken Riley YES roll 6) + Q3 (E-Verify by HR2 inclusion), 2A Q0+Q4 (NRA-PVF 2020 'A' endorsement letter; Bipartisan Safer Communities Act NO roll 299 6/24/22 — not among 14 GOP defectors). CROSS-AXIS NEGATIVE on Pillar B: (1) FP entire axis FALSE — as Defense Approps Chair he INTRODUCED + managed the Israel Security Supplemental Feb 2024 + voted YES on April 2024 $95B supplemental roll 151 + 'Supports Security Funding for Israel/Ukraine/Indo-Pacific' press release; he is the GOP defense-supplemental pusher, opposite of restraint; (2) IC Q4 FALSE — defense-industry capture documented at extraordinary scale per OpenSecrets: ~$390K from defense sector 2022 cycle (11% of $3.3M raised), ranked #2 House recipient of defense PAC/individual money, top contributors RTX/BAE/Leidos/Lockheed (LMT alone $70.3K in 2020), #2 Misc Defense + #3 Defense Electronics — combined with direct gavel control over the defense topline = textbook industry-capture overlap. NULL where evidence thin: FCS beyond HR5, CL beyond Equality Act NO, ES beyond FRA single vote, EI Q2+Q4, BI Q2+Q4, 2A Q1-Q3. SBA Pro-Life numeric / current-cycle NRA-PVF letter / FRC-AFA numerics did not surface. Advanced June-2-2026 primary against Kim — both R incumbents in CA-40.

will-rollins.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. STATUS FIX — candidacy currency: CalMatters reporting 2025-05-28 explicitly states 'Rollins, who also failed to unseat Calvert in 2022 and 2024, is not running again in 2026' (https://calmatters.org/politics/2025/05/inland-empire-election-congress/). Eight candidates are now in the race against Ken Calvert in the new CA-40 — seven Democrats (Anuj Dixit, Abel Chavez, Brandon Riker, Dave Karson, Jason Byors, Ferguson Porter, Tim Meyers) plus one R, Rollins is not among them. His campaign site willrollinsforcongress.com returns HTTP 403 (effectively dark). Setting candidacy_status: not_running + status: former so he leaves the active 2026 scorecard pool. Did NOT lose a 2026 primary (status: lost would be inaccurate) — he chose not to enter. Per-category cells null per runbook: archetype FALSE cells from 2022/2024 cycles (Planned Parenthood Action Fund + LGBTQ Victory Fund + Giffords endorsed in prior cycles) are not load-bearing for 2026 once he is off the ballot — high-bar null rather than carry forward un-re-cited prior-cycle scores. Confidence elevated to evidence_federal because the not-running fact itself is the evidence finalization for this record. Re-route CA-40 2026 research budget to the eight current 2026 filers (Dixit / Riker / Chavez top tier per CalMatters).

robert-garcia.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Textbook progressive D Heritage Action 0%/8% lifetime. HEADLINE FALSE wall: SOL Q0+Q4 FALSE (Planned Parenthood Action Fund 2024+2026 endorsement); BM Q0+Q2+Q4 FALSE (Equality California + LGBTQ Victory Fund endorsed; first openly gay immigrant in Congress; Equality Caucus member; reintroduced International Human Rights Defense Act); FCS Q1+Q2 FALSE (Dem-bloc NO on H.R.5 Parents Bill of Rights — 213-208 party-line); CL Q1 FALSE (Equality Caucus + anti-religious-exemption framing); EI Q1 FALSE HARD (on-camera MSNBC opposition to SAVE Act 'all about Donald Trump') + Q0 (led Oversight Dem DC Jail Jan-6-defendant 'insurrectionists' visit); BI Q0+Q2 FALSE HARD (HR2 Secure the Border NAY 5/11/23 roll 209 — only 2 Ds crossed; as Mayor directed Long Beach PD not to cooperate with ICE civil enforcement; Jan 24 2026 publicly called to 'abolish ICE' after Alex Pretti killing + opened ICE-violence-examination hearing as Oversight Ranking Member); 2A Q0+Q1+Q4 FALSE HARD (Giffords endorsed; LEAD SPONSOR Stop Militarizing Our Streets Act with Raskin + Andy Kim endorsed by Brady/Everytown/Giffords/Guns-Down/MFOL; introduced AMMO Act requiring federal licenses + background checks for ammunition sellers/buyers). FP genuinely SPLIT (no conservative-side TRUE): YES on $95B Israel/Ukraine/Indo-Pacific supplemental (interventionist FALSE on restraint) BUT also supported H.R.3565 LIMITING offensive arms transfers to Israel (left-of-AIPAC posture) — net no conservative cross-aisle catch, score FP NULL where ambiguous. INDUSTRY CAPTURE: Oversight Ranking Member antagonist-posture but no specific Big-Pharma/Big-Ag/Pentagon-audit cosponsor isolated — high-bar NULL across IC. NO CROSS-AISLE CATCHES — textbook progressive D from coastal CA district who votes party line. Advanced June-2-2026 primary.

maxine-waters.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Senior House progressive D Heritage 0% — archetype FALSE wall confirmed with HARD cites across Pillar A + EI + Border + 2A. HEADLINE FALSE HARD: SOL Q0+Q1+Q2+Q4 FALSE (NARAL / Reproductive Freedom for All 100% lifetime; EMILY's List endorsed; voted to eliminate Hyde restrictions); BM Q0+Q1+Q2+Q4 FALSE (YES on H.R.8404 RFMA roll 513 12/8/22; PFLAG 2025 National Champion of Justice; Equality Act long-time supporter; HRC endorsed); FCS Q1+Q2 FALSE (Dem-bloc NO on H.R.5 roll 161 3/24/23 — party-line context HARD); CL Q1 FALSE (Equality Act supporter); ES Q0+Q4 FALSE (NO on McCarthy debt-ceiling 2023; called IRA 'shameful' for too-small housing spend, wanted MORE not less); EI Q1 FALSE (SAVE Act Dem-bloc NO + public call for VRA floor vote); BI Q0+Q2 FALSE (H.R.2 NAY roll 209 — zero D crossover; June 2025 confronted armed Nat-Guard at LA ICE raids/protests in sanctuary posture); 2A Q0+Q1+Q4 FALSE HARD (100% gun-violence-prevention rating; 2019 public call to 'ban assault weapons or kick our a—out of Congress'). TWO HARD CROSS-AISLE CATCHES (narrow but documented): (1) FP Q1 TRUE — voted NAY on H.R.8034 Israel Security Supplemental 4/20/24 roll 152 — among ~40 D NAYs vs 366-58 passage + publicly called for 'immediate cease-fire in Gaza' (anti-blank-check restraint posture on Israel axis); caveat: she did sign separate pro-Israel resolution + supported Ukraine aid → score Q1 TRUE but Q0 NULL; (2) IC Q4 mixed — Wall Street oversight chair record (Wells Fargo 'recidivist' hearings, Equifax breach hearings, megabank-breakup bill, financial industry 'braced for her ascent') is a documented anti-capture record on financial-services axis — but the IC rubric q-cells are pharma/Big-Ag/Pentagon-focused, not Wall Street. To avoid mis-mapping, do not score IC cells TRUE on Wall Street evidence; high-bar NULL the IC q-cells but note the financial-capture record in notes. Additional nuance: EI Q0 — she OBJECTED to Trump electors Jan 6 2017 (parallel to GOP 2021 objection pattern). This is process-democratic-norm-breaking on both sides — null Q0 rather than scoring (her 2017 objection is documented but RESOLUTE rubric direction on Q0 hand-counted-paper-ballot doesn't map). Advanced June-2-2026 primary ~63%.
